title: Department of Demand & Market

frontmatter.title: Department of Demand & Market
frontmatter.description: Demand and market modeling — forecasting where traffic and subscribers will materialize so the network grows toward real demand.

body:
# Department of Demand & Market

Who the network should serve. Agents forecast demand from population, geography, and market signals,
turning raw geospatial data into a defensible view of where traffic and subscribers will materialize.

## Courses

| Code | Course | Level | Credits | Prereqs |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| [GROW-210](courses/grow-210.md) | Demand Modeling | Core | 4 | GROW-101 |

Part of the [School of Growth & Planning](../../index.md).
